name: Femboy Milking Farm
description:
Tags: Femboy, Hyper, Transformation, noncon, drugs, abuse, kidnapping, possible penis growth, possible ass expansion

During christmas eve, because of a heavy snowstorm you end up crashing your car in the middle of the countryside.

And after looking for a while for shelter you end up finding a barn... what misteries will this barn hold?

This story is connected to my other bots, the femboy virus, the sex room, the slutty cow girl virus (mtf) and the slutty bovine virus (bimbofication). The idea is to make this some kind of anthology which you can see through the eyes of different people in different circumstances. But the connections are subtle enough to not be too impactful, you can use any bot you want without it affecting the story at all.

ADVICE: FOR SOME REASON THIS FUCKING BOT ENDED UP KINDA FORGETFUL AND BUGGY????? SO TRY TO USE CHAT MEMORY, THAT WILL HELP A LOT, THIS WAS TESTED WITH JANITOR LLM AT 1.0 TEMPERATURE

Thank you all for the support and for enjoying my bots!! I wish you all merry christmas and a happy new years!!
